mapper.select: SELECT id , name FROM groups WHERE id = #{group_id}
SELECT id , name , role , avatar_path FROM members WHERE group_id = #{group_id}

SELECT t.id, t.title, t.location, t.started_at, t.ended_at, t.cover_photo_path, t.memo, t.created_at, COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) AS photo_count, COUNT(DISTINCT v.id) AS video_count FROM trips t LEFT JOIN photos p ON p.trip_id = t.id LEFT JOIN videos v ON v.trip_id = t.id GROUP BY t.id ORDER BY t.started_at IS NULL ASC, t.started_at DESC, t.created_at DESC

SELECT t.id, t.title, t.location, t.started_at, t.ended_at, t.cover_photo_path, t.memo, t.created_at, COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) AS photo_count, COUNT(DISTINCT v.id) AS video_count FROM trips t LEFT JOIN photos p ON p.trip_id = t.id LEFT JOIN videos v ON v.trip_id = t.id WHERE t.id = #{id} GROUP BY t.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO trips ( title, location, started_at, ended_at, memo, created_at ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{location}, #{started_at}, #{ended_at}, #{memo}, NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE trips
title = #{title},
location = #{location},
started_at = #{started_at},
ended_at = #{ended_at},
cover_photo_path = #{cover_photo_path},
memo = #{memo},
emoji = #{emoji},
WHERE id = #{id}
